titleStmt.title: SII 37.41: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 41. (A.R. No. 337 of 1938-39.) Chinnadāsaripalle, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up below the slope in front of the Narasiṁha temple on the hill.

This is dated in the cyclic year Vijaya, Jyeshṭha śu. 15. Since the cyclic year Vijaya corresponds to 1533-34 A.D. during the reign of Achyutarāya the details of the date correspond to 1533 A.D., June 6, Friday.

It records the grant of taxes durga-daṇayani-vartana, magga-sthāvara, grāmakaṭnam, etc., being collected in the village Voṅgunutulapalle, to god Ahōbalēśvara by Bācharasu, a kāryakarrta of the king situated in Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma in the gift is stated to have been made by the king at the request of Tāḷapāka Tirumalayyaṁgaru in the presence of god Viṭhalēśvara.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 116.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayabhyadaya śālivāhana śatakavaruṣaṁbulu Agunēṭiṁ vijaya saṁvva
tsara jēṣṭaśu 15 lu . śrīmaṁnmuhārājādirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa A
ccutarāya mahārāyalu pṛdvirājyaṁ jēyuṁcuṁḍḍaṁgānu Ārāyala kā
ryakartalaina bācarasugāru gaṁḍikōṭaṁ sīma yēlucuṁnnu Āgaṁḍikōṭaṁ sīmalō
voṁgunutula Ahōbalēśvarulaku cellēvogunutula pallekuṁnnu naḍicē durga da
ṇaya nivartana maggastāvaraga grāma kaṭnaṁlu Aṁduva suṁkalu suṁkastastāvaralu mōdalaina
Aṁddudārāvōśiyiccinadharmmaśāsana kramameṭlaṁnnannutāḷapākatirumalayyagā
ru Anatiyyagānu rāyala Appaṇa paḍini viṭalēśvaruni saṁnidhini sarrava mānyaṁgānu
dāravōśiyistimi . Aniyicina dharmaśāsanaṁ . yidurgaṁ yavvarēlinānu yi rītini tappa
ka naḍacuvāru ... svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ . paradattāpa hārēṇa sva
dattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 37.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
